app.title: UNDP Crisis Response Platform
app.subtitle: Community-powered damage assessment and rapid response
app.poweredBy: Powered by the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP)
app.openSource: Open-source platform for community-powered crisis response

submit.title: Submit Crisis Report
submit.helpText: Share photos and information about damaged infrastructure to help emergency responders prioritize aid and recovery efforts.
submit.successMessage: Submission successful! Thank you for your report.
submit.locationRequired: Please enable location services or enter coordinates manually
submit.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
submit.locationError: Unable to get location. Please enable location services or enter manually.
submit.submitError: Error submitting report. Please try again.

export.title: Export Data
export.description: Export crisis submissions for analysis and reporting. Available formats:
export.jsonDesc: Structured data for APIs and applications
